# Launch

| Model           | API model ID      | Description           |
| --------------- | ----------------- | --------------------- |
| Claude Fable 5  | `claude-fable-5`  | Widely released model |
| Claude Mythos 5 | `claude-mythos-5` | Limited release model |

They share a 1M token context window and up to 128k output tokens.

Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 become available on June 9, 2026.

## Adaptive thinking is always on

Supported features include Effort, Code execution, Programmatic tool calling, and context editing.
